title: Are there any Misato related topic in here
display_title: Are there any Misato related topic in here
wikitext:
[]: Are there any Misato related topic in here?             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Thu Aug 22, 2019 4:54 pm Misato is my favourite character from EVA so I want find a topic especially about her. If there's aren't any then this topic is become the Misato fan topic from now. Also here's a good tribute video to her: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7LAtNfqrpEA

[]: Re: Are there any Misato related topic in here?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 23, 2019 9:43 am There are plenty already. Search doesn't show any of them because "Misato" for some reason is listed as a too common term to narrow down results significantly, but you can go into literally any eva-related subforum and find at least one thread about her on the first two pages of the search results

[]: Re: Are there any Misato related topic in here?             Quote Post by Luigi shinji » Fri Aug 23, 2019 2:32 pm Blockio wrote: There are plenty already. Search doesn't show any of them because "Misato" for some reason is listed as a too common term to narrow down results significantly, but you can go into literally any eva-related subforum and find at least one thread about her on the first two pages of the search results
